name: chain_acquisition_ios5999__499__ban
method: [ACQUISITION] [iOS][$59.99 → $4.99 ] Ban It - Quit Bad Habits & Compete With Friends [rev: $$59.99]

stages.task: Scan App Store (iTunes Search API + AppFollow/SensorTower free tier) for habit/productivity apps with price drop >70% in last 30d, >50 ratings, category: Health & Fitness or Productivity
Score each app: rating (1-5), review count (log scale), price history steepness, category fit (habit/streak/social = HIGH), revenue estimate from AppFollow free data
Extract developer email from App Store page or developer website, draft cold acquisition email using cold_outreach templates, queue in leads pipeline
